Descriptions.Description: DISPLAY DLR DEMO FLR FLTR
BROCHURE KW TRY IT M 25PK
DISPLAY DLR DEMO FLRE FLH
Flare Windshield Display with Flyer - FLR
Eye-catching display for Flare Windshields
Includes flyers
Contact your sales rep for details on how to receive this display with qualifying purchases.
Fire Extinguisher Mount - Quick Release - 3-1/4"
Made from aircraft-grade 6061 aluminum and stainless steel
Precision machined for a perfect fit
All contact points have O-rings so that it will not wear or rattle
Pull the red quick-release handle and the fire extinguisher is ready to go
Fits around any cage tubing 1.5", 1.75", 1.85" and 2.0" OD
Fire Extinguisher is not included.
Flare Windshield Display - '23-'25 FLTR
Flare® Windshield - 10" - Dark Smoke - FXLRST
The innovative design of the Flare® features “hips” at the outer edge of the shield that re-route the air to add downforce to the front of the bike, improving stability vs riding with a stock shield
The “flip” at the top of the Flare® is designed to kick the air up and back as “clean”, less turbulent air for the rider and passenger
Made from premium hard-coated polycarbonate material for safety and added durability
All are pre-drilled for easy mounting using stock windshield hardware
Made in the USA

Use only gentle cleaners like Shine Werks or mild soapy water to protect the tint and coating. Harsh ammonia, alcohol or solvent-based cleaners like Windex can strip wax and UV protection. If using dish soap, always follow up with a wax-based cleaner like Shine Werks to maintain performance.
Universal Mount - 2X6mm
Allows the ability to mount virtually anything that could be bolted to a roll cage or wakeboard tower
Billet machined with black anodized finish
Fits around any cage tubing in 1.5", 1.75", 1.85" and 2" OD
Requires OD size specific strap clamp (sold separately)
GoPro® Camera Mount
360° rotation allows your camera to be set to a precise viewpoint
Made from billet aluminum
Compatible with the camera's mounting accessories so it can be mounted perpendicular to the bar and more
Works with a GoPro handlebar mount
Fits around any cage tubing in 1.5", 1.75", 1.85" and 2" OD
Requires one OD size-specific Strap Clamp (sold separately)
Cage Clamp - Inward
Universal cage mounting clamp allows for most small billet Klock Werks parts to be mounted on the Ranger/General/Defender cages
Billet machined construction and anodized black
Cage Clamp - Outward
Universal cage mounting clamp allows for most small billet Klock Werks parts to be mounted on the Ranger/General/Defender cages
Billet machined construction and anodized black
Roll Cage Phone Mount - Offset - 1-7/8"
Allows the iOsphere Roll Cage Backing Plate to mount on any cage tubing, in any location, with the correct strap clamp for the correct tubing size

Simple, secure and universal mounting system for your phone or device connects seamlessly to other Klock Werks iOmounts™ products, including phone mounts for your quad, dirt bike, car, home, office and more
Infinite rotational adjustment, sleek modern design and forward compatibility - If you upgrade to a new phone or GPS, you don’t have to buy a new mounting system
Purchase additional iOdisc disks to use multiple devices on the same mount
Saddlebag Upper Covers - Slotted - HD Touring
Accent the line of your fender and hide clutter for a custom look
Steel construction with E-coating, ready to color match paint
Upper fillers mate up to the stock fender/lower filler on Street Glides
Requires removal of stock license plate mount bar
Made in the USA
Can also be used on FLHT/FLTR/FLHR models when used in conjunction with Klock Werks lower filler panels - see related parts.
Lower Filler - Smooth - Black - HD Touring
Designed to fill the void between the lower fender and saddlebags; a minor detail that makes a major impact!
Constructed from 16-gauge steel and E-coated for rust and corrosion resistance
The only steel fillers designed to be used with or without detachables
Great to use in conjunction with Klock Werks Curvaceous Upper Fillers to smooth out that entire area - see Related Products
Includes all necessary hardware and instructions to install
Made in the USA
Lower Filler - Detachable - Black - HD Touring
Designed to fill the void between the lower fender and saddlebags; a minor detail that makes a major impact!
Constructed from 16-gauge steel and E-coated for rust and corrosion resistance
The only steel fillers designed to be used with or without detachables
Great to use in conjunction with Klock Werks Curvaceous Upper Fillers to smooth out that entire area - see Related Products
Includes all necessary hardware and instructions to install
Made in the USA
Universal Mount - 1X8mm
Allows the ability to mount virtually anything that could be bolted to a roll cage or wakeboard tower
Billet machined with black anodized finish
Fits around any cage tubing in 1.5", 1.75", 1.85" and 2" OD
Requires OD size specific strap clamp (sold separately)
Seat Insulation Kit - Indian Chief/Chieftain/Roadmaster
Reduce the heat from under your seat by 10°
Keeps your seat cooler by deflecting heat from the rear rocker cover
Easy installation, precut material and only takes about 10 minutes
Made in the USA
Grab Handle Device Mount
Uses a small square clamp strap to custom fit the passenger grab handle in the RZR
Allows for device capture on the passenger side of the car
Co-pilots can see their own device, log miles or navigate for their driver with this mount placed directly in front of them
Includes all necessary hardware and two iOadapt Disc
Device Mount - Switch Knockout Hole
Universal UTV rocker switch mount easily assembles to standard dash rocker switch slot (.830" x 1.450") for quick access to cell phones/devices
Patented ultra-strong magnetic interface retains devices in the most severe off-road environments
Infinite angle adjustment for devices
Mount retention lip secures device on magnet for added retention
Includes mounting system and two adhesive iOadapt™ Discs
Device Mount - 1.75 - RZR
iOsphere Roll Cage Mount allows the iOsphere Roll Cage Backing Plate to mount on any cage tubing, in any location, with the correct strap clamp size
Uses the same patented iOmount device mount technology as all other Klock Werks mounts
Make your device mounting system Kustom and tailored to your specific size and needs
Simple, secure and universal mounting system for your phone or device
Infinite rotational adjustment, sleek modern design, and it's forward compatible
Included in box: 1 Semisphere mount, 1 Strap Clamp, 2 iOadapt steel disks, 1 magnetic black iOcore, and hardware (if necessary)

Column Device Mount - Talon
Allows driver to easily monitor their device just in front of the steering wheel
Ultra-strong magnetic interface holds devices in most severe off-road environments
Once mounted, device can swivel and rotate to the perfect angle for great visibility
Adhesive requires 24 hours of cure time
Hardware included
Made in the U.S.A.
Saddlebag Upper Covers - Smooth - HD Touring
Accent the line of your fender and hide clutter for a custom look
Steel construction with E-coating, ready to color match paint
Upper fillers mate up to the stock fender/lower filler on Street Glides

Made in the USA

Air Deflectors - Honda - GL
Clear deflectors with aluminum mounting brackets
Engineered to add comfort and stability for Gold Wing riders
Adjustable and designed to use the air coming around the cowling of the motorcycle more effectively
Open to let the warmer air at your torso or close to deflect most of the cool air away from your riding position
Can be used with the Klock Werks Flare® Windshield for Gold Wings and the Mirror Wings, for ultimate air management
Sound Control - Fairing Kit - Indian Challenger/Pursuit
High-efficiency sound-dampening material
Stops fairing vibration and directs music out towards rider
No measuring, no cutting, easy to install; peel and stick
Achieve tighter bass and clearer music with your stock stereo
Custom cut per motorcycle, resulting in no waste and no guesswork
Made in the USA
iOmounts™ Device Mount - Switch Mount - Black
Easy to install motorcycle model specific mounts that incorporate the iOmounts™ system
Install mount on bike with included hardware
Attach razor-thin iOadapt stainless steel adapter to your device and connect to the powerful iOcore magnetic carrier
No special case needed. Device is held in place by the strong iOcore magnet and can be adjusted to preferred angle
iOskin provides perfect surface to mount iOadapt and protects device
Purchase additional iOadapt discs to use multiple devices on same mount

Universal iOmount™ Mount
Secure devices within any vehicle with a flat mounting surface (stick-on or bolt-on options)
Universal kit is perfect not only for UTVs but also boats, tractors, semis, hot rods and more
Attach razor-thin iOadapt stainless steel adapter to your device and connect to the powerful iOcore magnetic carrier
No special case needed; device is held in place by the strong iOcore magnet and can be adjusted to preferred angle
Includes semisphere mount, adhesive patch, two iOadapt steel disks and one magnetic black iOcore
Adhesive requires 72 hours for proper cure time
Purchase additional iOadapt discs to use multiple devices on same mount
Not for use with devices that actively use inductive charging
Not for use with Samsung Galaxy S4 phones
Device Mount Tether - Phone
No matter where you are – close to home or far away – the Klock Werks iOmounts™ Phone Tether will keep your smartphone close at hand
Klock Werks iOmounts™ Phone Tether can be used with the rest of Klock Werks iOmounts™ Phone Mounts to give you an added sense of security and piece of mind when using or mounting your smart device
Functional design allows you to use it with almost all phone and case combinations
iOstand™ - Stainless Steel
Functional and flexible iPad® stand and tablet mount
Lifts your device up 7" and rotates in any direction for the perfect viewing angle (360° rotating)
Universal stand is the perfect tablet mount and improves the ergonomics of your desktop or workspace
Crafted out of beautiful precision-machined steel
Works with the versatile iOmounts™ system that is safe and compatible with most mobile devices
Regular size iOstand™ works best for full-size tablets like the iPad® Air, iPad® Pro or Samsung Galaxy Tab
Magnets won’t damage your tablet, and there are no magnets in the iOdisc™ on your device
Includes two iOdiscs™
Made in the USA

Matches Flare® Windshields or custom paint schemes
Handguard material finishes are made from acrylic
Manufactured from aluminum, the hardware come in black and are e-coated from out of the box; for something more custom, hardware can be stripped, polished and anodized to color match build components

Clean with gentle solutions like Shine Werks® or mild soapy water; avoid ammonia, alcohol, or solvent-based cleaners (like Windex®) to preserve tint, coating, and UV protection; if using dish soap, follow with a wax-based cleaner like Shine Werks® for optimal performance.

Does not fit '04-'13 XL models without a shim, '04-'22 XL models with off-set mirror brackets, or with bar-end mirrors; certain handlebar and windshield combinations may have clearance issues; vendor recommends holding the handguards and bracket hardware up to handlebars to anticipate any contact issues before installation; contact issues will likely only occur in close quarters/parking scenarios.

iOmounts® Magnetic Phone Mount for BMW - Ambidextrous - Black
Ambidextrous mount is engineered to fit BMW motorcycle controls on either side, aligning your phone perfectly with the handlebar line for a clean, integrated look
Easy installation means the mount attaches securely using the included hardware; designed to fit select BMW® models without modification
The iOcore™ magnetic carrier locks your device in place through every curve and vibration, without magnets ever touching your phone directly
Rotate your device to the ideal viewing angle for navigation or quick-glance access, without compromising control or visibility
Sleek, low-profile design matches the precision and style of BMW motorcycles, adding function without disrupting the bike’s streamlined aesthetic
Works with all smartphones and GPS devices; swap or upgrade devices easily with additional iOdiscs™ (not compatible with silicone cases)
Extend use beyond your BMW—the iOmounts® system transitions seamlessly into cars, boats, or even home setups with other Klock Werks iOmounts® accessories
Enjoy wireless, inductive charging capability by removing the iOdisc™ case when using a charging pad or cradle
Kit includes semisphere handlebar mount, iOcore™, 2 iOdiscs™, phone tether, and mounting hardware

Replacement iOadapt Disc - No Inductive Charging
A razor-thin, unobtrusive steel disk that adheres to the device
Replacement mounting disc for iOadapt device mounts
iOmounts™ Device Mount - Switch Mount - Chrome
Easy to install motorcycle model specific mounts that incorporate the iOmounts™ system
Install mount on bike with included hardware

Easy installation with simple setup and all necessary hardware

Clean with gentle solutions like Shine Werks® or mild soapy water; avoid ammonia, alcohol, or solvent-based cleaners (like Windex®) to preserve tint, coating, and UV protection; if using dish soap, follow with a wax-based cleaner like Shine Werks® for optimal performance.

Does not fit '04-'13 XL models without a shim, '04-'22 XL models with off-set mirror brackets, or with bar-end mirrors; certain handlebar and windshield combinations may have clearance issues; vendor recommends holding the handguards and bracket hardware up to handlebars to anticipate any contact issues before installation; contact issues will likely only occur in close quarters/parking scenarios.

All fenders come pre-drilled and are stamped, not spun, to ensure a consistent finish while minimizing body work
E-coated to prevent rust and corrosion
Measures 6.5" outside width
Kit includes zinc-plated mounting hardware
Made in the USA

The One Rear Fender - Frenched - Black - Steel
Frenched with a frenched license plate pocket
An all steel option for those Bagger owners that want that seamless one piece rear end look
Stamped 14-gauge steel construction with integrated bag-to-fender filler panels
The same deep draw stamping quality as the rest of the Klock Werks sheet metal line
Filler panels are 100% TIG welded to fender
Filler panels mate up to rear top strut covers perfectly
Dual exhaust cut out in the bottom of the filler mate up to extended bag and bag extensions offered in the aftermarket
8.625” wide with 4” stretch
Look equally as good without extended bag
Accept all stock detachable mounting hardware/brackets
Made in the USA
For use with Klock Werks license plate frame - see related parts.

Klip Hanger Handlebar for Indian - 12" - Black/Chrome
The ultimate in rider personal adjustment and fit
Innovative "Klamps" allow the control/grip portions of the handlebar to be adjusted in several directions to allow the rider to find that perfect fit
Include handlebars manufactured from DOM tubing, clamps machined from 6061 billet aluminum, chrome hardware, & polished aluminum domed bar end plugs
Bars are drilled and slotted for internal wiring and work with heated grips
Bar ends are slotted for throttle-by-wire option
Fully knurled center section (riser clamp area) for use with stock riser clamp set-up
Made in the USA

Klip Hanger Handlebar - 19" - Chrome
Innovative bars present the ultimate in rider personal adjustment and fit
Unique "Klamps" allow control/grip portions of the handlebar to be adjusted in several directions; rider can tailor to his/her exact liking
Bar sections are manufactured from DOM tubing, 'Klamps' are machined from 6061 billet aluminum, all hardware is stainless steel
All feature a fully knurled riser clamp area for standard 5-1/4" width 1” risers
All are drilled/slotted for wiring and bar end is notched for Throttle-By-Wire applications
All include chromed, billet aluminum, domed bar end plugs for a finished look
Works with Harley-Davidson OEM heated grips
Made in the USA

Flare® Windshield - 13" - Clear - Can-Am
Constructed from hard-coated polycarbonate the same material used to create bulletproof windows
Provides the wind/debris protection you need without sacrificing your ability to see

Innovative Flare® Windshield design features hips at outer edge of shield that re-route air; and a flip at the top is designed to kick the air up and back to deliver clean, less turbulent air for driver and passenger
Unlike flat shields that don't work if they are too low or loss of visibility if it's too high, you'll still be able to look over the Flare, even after it's caked in mud
Includes AXIA Alloys roll cage clamps and detachable hardware; clamps and thumbscrew turn knobs are machined from billet aluminum with a black anodized finish
Installation hardware included
Made in USA

Use only gentle cleaners like Shine Werks or mild soapy water to protect the tint and coating. Harsh ammonia, alcohol or solvent-based cleaners like Windex can strip wax and UV protection. If using dish soap, always follow up with a wax-based cleaner like Shine Werks to maintain performance.

Kolor Flare® Windshield - 6-1/2" - Green - '96-'13 FLHT/FLHX
The innovative design of the Flare® features “hips” at the outer edge of the shield that re-route the air to add downforce to the front of the bike, improving stability vs riding with a stock shield
The “flip” at the top of the Flare® is designed to kick the air up and back as “clean”, less turbulent air for the rider and passenger
Kolor Flare® Windshields have a vibrant fluorescent edge to give your motorcycle a little extra pop and are made from a high-quality acrylic
Pre-drilled for easy mounting using stock windshield hardware
Made in the USA

Use only gentle cleaners like Shine Werks or mild soapy water to protect the tint and coating. Harsh ammonia, alcohol or solvent-based cleaners like Windex can strip wax and UV protection. If using dish soap, always follow up with a wax-based cleaner like Shine Werks to maintain performance.

Sport Flare® Windshield - 6" - Clear - '15-'25 FLTR

The Sport Flare® is more streamlined and offers radical curves and sportier stance; it compliments the lines of the fairing with a more aggressive profile and adds stability and handling with improved air management

The patented design features "hips" at the sides that re-route the wind away from riders while adding downforce to the front-end of the motorcycle to improve stability vs. riding with the stock windshield
The "flip" at the top of the Flare® redirects air back as clean, less turbulent air for rider and passenger
Wind tunnel designed and tested
Made from premium hard-coated polycarbonate material for safety and added durability
All are pre-drilled for easy mounting using stock windshield hardware
Made in the USA

The Pro-Touring Flare® is a wider, more full-coverage option for riders and passengers that prefer an even greater amount of wind protection for the long haul and is stylish enough to use around town

The patented design features "hips" at the sides that re-route the wind away from riders while adding downforce to the front-end of the motorcycle to improve stability vs. riding with the stock windshield
The flip at the top of the Flare® redirects air back as clean, less turbulent air for rider and passenger
Wind tunnel designed and tested
Made from premium hard-coated polycarbonate material for safety and added durability
All are predrilled for easy mounting using stock windshield hardware
Made in the USA

Pro-Touring Flare® Windshield - 14" - Tinted - '98-'13 FLTR
The Pro-Touring Flare® is a wider, more full-coverage option for riders and passengers that prefer an even greater amount of wind protection for the long haul and is stylish enough to use around town

The patented design features "hips" at the sides that re-route the wind away from riders while adding downforce to the front-end of the motorcycle to improve stability vs. riding with the stock windshield
The flip at the top of the Flare® redirects air back as clean, less turbulent air for rider and passenger

The “flip” at the top of the Flare® is designed to kick the air up and back as “clean”, less turbulent air for the rider and passenger
Kolor Flare® Windshields have a vibrant fluorescent edge to give your motorcycle a little extra pop and are made from a high-quality acrylic
Pre-drilled for easy mounting using stock windshield hardware
Made in the USA

Use only gentle cleaners like Shine Werks or mild soapy water to protect the tint and coating. Harsh ammonia, alcohol or solvent-based cleaners like Windex can strip wax and UV protection. If using dish soap, always follow up with a wax-based cleaner like Shine Werks to maintain performance.

Dash with Switch Relocation Kit
Kit gives bikes a more streamlined, smooth, show finish
Visually increases length of tank without actually stretching it
Metal dash has a raw finish and fits stock-length tank
Reuses stock ignition switch and key; ignition switch mount replaces the horn mount and requires horn relocation
Ignition switch relocation mount is CNC-machined from T-6061 aluminum, show chromed, is easy to install and uses factory wiring
Necessary mounting hardware included
Made in the U.S.A.
Does not include cutout for indicator lights.
Mount Ignition Switch
CNC-machined from T-6061 aluminum including a Klock Werks logo, then chrome-plated for a show-shine finish
A custom detail for riders using a smooth tank or doing a custom build
Reuses stock ignition switch and key; ignition switch mount replaces the obtrusive horn mount and requires horn relocation
Easy-to-install, allows switch to use factory wiring
Necessary mounting hardware included
Made in the U.S.A.
License Plate Harness - Honda Talon
Allows for easy wiring of any LED lights, brake light, license plate light, or powered LED lighted whip
Can be plugged into each taillight for additional accessories
Recommended for low current lights or to trigger a relay for larger high power lights
Simple one-minute install; a true plug and play accessory with no cutting required
Do not overload the vehicles electrical system. If circuit is overloaded it could cause the fuse to blow or damage the OEM wiring
Seat Belt Bypass Harness - Honda Talon
Plug and play. No cutting, no splicing or soldering
Sport Flare® Windshield - 12" - Tinted - '98-'13 FLTR

The Sport Flare® is more streamlined and offers radical curves and sportier stance; it compliments the lines of the fairing with a more aggressive profile and adds stability and handling with improved air management

The patented design features "hips" at the sides that re-route the wind away from riders while adding downforce to the front-end of the motorcycle to improve stability vs. riding with the stock windshield
The "flip" at the top of the Flare® redirects air back as clean, less turbulent air for rider and passenger
Wind tunnel designed and tested
Made from premium hard-coated polycarbonate material for safety and added durability
All are pre-drilled for easy mounting using stock windshield hardware
Made in the USA

The “flip” at the top of the Flare® is designed to kick the air up and back as “clean”, less turbulent air for the rider and passenger
Made from premium hard-coated polycarbonate material for safety and added durability
All are pre-drilled for easy mounting using stock windshield hardware
Made in the USA

Use only gentle cleaners like Shine Werks or mild soapy water to protect the tint and coating. Harsh ammonia, alcohol or solvent-based cleaners like Windex can strip wax and UV protection. If using dish soap, always follow up with a wax-based cleaner like Shine Werks to maintain performance.

Sport Flare® Windshield - 12" - Dark Smoke - '96-'13 FLTR

The Sport Flare® is more streamlined and offers radical curves and sportier stance; it compliments the lines of the fairing with a more aggressive profile and adds stability and handling with improved air management

The Lighted License Plate Mount can be roll cage or bumper mounted, either vertically or horizontally
This 6061 Billet aluminum accessory comes with a wired 12v LED light
Fits all standard motorcycle size plates
Universal fitment when paired with the proper strap clamp (sold separately) that matches the outside diameter (OD) of the tubing where the accessory will be mounted

Sport Flare® Windshield - 8" - Black - FLTR

The Sport Flare® option is more streamlined and offers radical curves and a sportier stance, it complements the lines of the new fairing with a more aggressive profile and adds stability and handling with improved air management

The patented design features "hips" at the sides that re-route the wind away from riders while adding downforce to the front-end of the motorcycle to improve stability vs. riding with the stock windshield
The "flip" at the top of the Flare® redirects air back as clean, less turbulent air for rider and passenger

The “flip” at the top of the Flare® is designed to kick the air up and back as “clean”, less turbulent air for the rider and passenger
Made from premium hard-coated polycarbonate material for safety and added durability
All are pre-drilled for easy mounting using stock windshield hardware
Made in the USA

Use only gentle cleaners like Shine Werks or mild soapy water to protect the tint and coating. Harsh ammonia, alcohol or solvent-based cleaners like Windex can strip wax and UV protection. If using dish soap, always follow up with a wax-based cleaner like Shine Werks to maintain performance.

iOmounts™ Garmin Mount - Black
Easily mount your phone to your bike's Garmin or Wahoo computer when you’re riding inside
Use your smartphone for training or swap your Garmin to your smartphone to use with Strava, MTB Project or other great navigation and training apps
Swapping from your phone to bike computer just takes a click
Converter clicks into your Garmin or Wahoo mount, and its magnetic face lets you mount any mobile device equipped with the included iOAdapt steel disc
Includes one convert with magnet face and two iOAdapt discs that can be installed on any smartphone
Convert body is compatible with most Wahoo and Garmin handlebar mounts (Not compatible with the Wahoo Elemnt Bolt and Wahoo Elemnt Roam mounts)
